svg.title: SecureAI Architecture Map
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram of the SecureAI platform showing frontend, API gateway, core engines, databases, and external services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SecureAI frontend')
g.text: Landing · Playground · Pricing · Waitlist — deployed on Vercel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the SecureAI API gateway work?')
g.text: CORS · HIPAA middleware · Request logger · Per-route rate limiter (sliding window, org-keyed)
Bearer token · SHA-256 key hash lookup · bcrypt.compare() · RBAC roles: admin / executor / approver
